'''Mawbo Kem''' was the owner of the reasonably disreputable [[Mawbo's Performance Hall]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She was well-known among the locals for having many lovers.

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] Mawbo Kem hosted an auction in her performance hall, at which one of the items for sale was the famous [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] moss painting [[Killik Twilight]].
